description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ${DEPENDENCY_PROXY_PREFIX}${BASE_QA_IMAGE} Docker image for PHP jobs and ${DEPENDENCY_PROXY_PREFIX}${NODE_IMAGE} for Node jobs, defines caches for Composer lock (key composer) and vendor_bundled, and a .npm cache for Node. Define stages build, tiki-check, unit-tests, lint, vendors-security, composer-stability, package-tiki. In the build stage run a composer job that installs dependencies with `composer --ansi install -d vendor_bundled --no-progress --prefer-dist --no-interaction`, caches .composercache and vendor_bundled, and stores vendor_bundled/vendor/ as an artifact; also run composer-dbdiff that installs its own Composer deps, caches .composercache-dbdiff, and artifacts doc/devtools/dbdiff/vendor/. In the tiki-check stage run composer-could-update-lock (dry‑run update), composer-ext-check (php doc/devtools/check_composer_extensions.php), composer-operator-check (apt‑get install jq then ./doc/devtools/check_caret_operator.sh), composer-stability (php doc/devtools/check_composer_stability.php with manual, schedule and branch rules), composer-validates (composer validate), console-php-works (php console.php), .composer-lock (copy composer binary, self‑update, run doc/devtools/update_composer_lock.php and diff before/after lock files), check-alphabetical-list (php doc/devtools/check_alphabetical_list.php with MR and push rules), check-platform-binaries (sh doc/devtools/check_platform_binaries.sh), check-custom-folder (fails on changes in _custom), and the db-upgrade-24-mysql, db-upgrade-25-mysql, db-upgrade-26-mysql, db-upgrade-27-mysql, db-upgrade-28-mysql jobs that each use the shared schema‑upgrade script with MySQL service (different IMAGE and DBFILE variables) and publish sql dumps as artifacts. In the unit-tests stage run unit-tests (phpunit with report.xml JUnit artifact) using MySQL, Elasticsearch and Manticore services, and eslint (npx eslint .) using the Node image. In the lint stage run check-bom-encoding (php doc/devtools/check_bom_encoding.php) and check-directories (php console.php dev:buildwsconfs). In the vendors-security stage run vendor-security-check that updates Composer, requires many security‑related packages, and runs only on scheduled pipelines where $SCHEDULER == "vendor_check". All jobs declare appropriate needs, rules/only/except, artifacts that expire in 2 days, and use the defined caches.
